rules_text:
Blood 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 blood mana to play this card.)[/i]
Whenever an opponent loses hunger, attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 1 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
